content: I am currently getting close with having the Rust-for-Linux tree checked by klint. I do still however need a mapping between FFI functions and their behaviour/property. It's a quite long list, if someone can help me filling it in/checking errors it would be great! https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1j4h9F7fZsn2ODys9l7_WlbYfQPj-ew5YZG7xDarIY1I/edit?usp=sharing
Have you considered making the annotating process more "programmable"? For example, in a file of kernel source?
What are the possible states? : CANT_SLEEP, MIGHT_SLEEP, NO_ASSUMPTION. I guess that is all, isn't it?
